notes: v371 — a new deep-dive lesson. Added Lesson 29 · 'Anatomy of a card — every number explained' to 🎓 Lessons: a full plain-English walkthrough of EVERY number, badge and icon on the Signal report card — the fired count, % higher, EDGE, the SOLID / PROMISING / TOO EARLY tiers, median vs wins/losses, the ✓ 'held up in both halves' durability check, the 🟩/🟥 risk-on/risk-off tape, the 📜 track record, the two-way up/down splits, and how 🧩 combinations can beat single flags. Ends with a 3-question quiz. The habit it teaches: read a card right-to-left — durability (📜 + both halves) first, score last. Nothing about your balances, holdings or the auto-pilot changed. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5).
